arts.ttl: Report: Bayern add Marseille winger to transfer targets
arts.sum: Luis Henrique could be on his way to Bavaria in summer according to the latest report from a German source.

arts.ttl: Marseille condemn 'personal attacks' on Rabiot at PSG
arts.sum: Marseille condemn the "personal attacks" aimed at midfielder Adrien Rabiot and his family during the 3-1 defeat at Paris St-Germain on Sunday.
